dsVert 1.1.0
  • Reference

Convert base64url to standard base64

Source: R/mpcUtils.R
dot-base64url_to_base64.Rd

Converts base64url encoding (URL-safe) to standard base64. This is needed because R's parser on Opal/Rock has issues with "/" and "+" characters in long strings passed as function parameters.

Usage

.base64url_to_base64(x)

Arguments

x

Character string in base64url encoding

Value

Character string in standard base64 encoding

On this page
